message.i_love_moe.minecraft_profile.dis: Before the first upload: the Mod will send your Minecraft ID and UUID with each image so the ID can be shown on its shared page. Display is ON by default and can be turned off for each image on the web management page. This information does not verify account ownership. %s %s
message.i_love_moe.minecraft_profile.can: Upload cancelled. Your Minecraft ID and UUID were not sent
message.i_love_moe.error.screenshot_miss: The screenshot could not be found
message.i_love_moe.error.auto_upload_plu: Plus could not be verified, so auto-upload was turned OFF
message.i_love_moe.error.image_too_large: The image is larger than 10 MB
message.i_love_moe.error.invalid_png: The image is not a valid PNG
message.i_love_moe.error.invalid_server_: The server information could not be sent
message.i_love_moe.error.invalid_image_t: Enter an image title between 1 and 100 characters
message.i_love_moe.error.upload_limit_re: You have reached your upload limit for the last 30 days
message.i_love_moe.error.upload_rate_lim: Too many uploads were attempted. Please wait and try again
message.i_love_moe.error.image_rejected: This image cannot be uploaded under the service rules
message.i_love_moe.error.moderation_unav: The safety check is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later
message.i_love_moe.error.too_many_reques: Please wait a while and try again
message.i_love_moe.error.email_unavailab: The sign-in email could not be sent
message.i_love_moe.error.not_found: The image could not be found
message.i_love_moe.error.api: Could not connect to the server
message.i_love_moe.error.api_with_code: Could not connect to the server (%s)
